overall.description: A cinematic drive through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning under a concrete overpass with green ambient lighting and progressing through increasingly dense neon-lit commercial districts. The vehicle passes massive holographic billboards including Kiroshi and Below Deck advertisements, eventually slowing to a stop at a traffic light in the heart of the cyberpunk downtown.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered highway underpass characterized by green illuminated concrete walls and a dark overhead structure. The lighting is entirely artificial, creating a moody, enclosed atmosphere before transitioning to the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway approaching commercial district with elevated train tracks

events.description: transitioning from artificial green underpass lighting to dusk sky with neon billboard illumination
slight right turn while maintaining speed on the highway

agents.ego_description: cruising on open highway with increasing visibility of large digital billboards and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

massive vertical digital advertisement displaying beverage branding
futuristic monorail or train track structure running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the vehicle enters an open highway with visible dusk sky and prominent neon billboards. The Westbrook district sign marks the entrance to a denser commercial area, while elevated train tracks run parallel on the left and a yellow taxi leads the way ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Westbrook commercial district with dense holographic advertising and neon signage

events.description: entering dense urban core with towering Kiroshi building and massive Below Deck billboard
passing under blue-lit overpass structure with intense neon reflections

decorative trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the street
elevated walkway or highway with intense blue neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through the heart of Westbrook, surrounded by massive corporate advertisements including the iconic Kiroshi tower and Below Deck billboard. Decorative cherry blossom trees with pink neon lights line the street as the car passes under a blue-lit overpass, immersing the scene in vibrant cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown intersection approach with tunnel entrance and Set Sail billboard

events.description: approaching red traffic light and slowing down for intersection
significant deceleration as vehicle approaches stopped traffic at intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching a busy intersection with red traffic light, navigating through dense neon signage

notable_agents.action: black car ahead braking to stop at the red traffic light

entered.detail: large horizontal advertisement with 'SET SAIL' text and portrait imagery
dark tunnel opening with illuminated archway at the end of the street
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
structure with distinctive pink illuminated archway decorations at street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the densest part of the city, passing the Below Deck billboard and approaching an intersection with a Set Sail advertisement. The street narrows with buildings featuring pink neon arches as the car slows down for a red traffic light at the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with crosswalk and tunnel entrance, waiting at traffic signal

events.description: coming to a complete stop behind the lead vehicle at the red light
traffic light changes from red to green, signaling permission to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light waiting to enter the tunnel, observing cross traffic and neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: silver sports car crossing the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop at the intersection, waiting at the red traffic light with the tunnel entrance ahead. A silver car crosses from the left, and the traffic light changes to green as the scene ends, surrounded by the glow of the Set Sail billboard and pink neon arches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a moody, enclosed underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath a dark overhead structure with green illuminated concrete walls, moving forward until the enclosed space opens into a dusk-lit highway marked by the Westbrook district sign and parallel elevated train tracks. As the vehicle penetrates deeper into the city, the environment shifts into a dense corporate landscape featuring the Kiroshi tower and Below Deck billboards, with pink neon cherry blossom trees lining the street under a blue-lit overpass. The scene then narrows through a corridor of pink neon arches and Set Sail advertisements before the car slows down for a red traffic light at a tunnel entrance. Finally, the vehicle comes to a complete stop as a silver car crosses the intersection, remaining stationary until the light turns green amidst the surrounding glow of the city's holographic displays.
